creator: jrm@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 149121
patch pkg-install to create directory /var/games/emacs if it doesn't already exist

Small issue:

# pkg install emacs24-24.4,3

30 MB to be downloaded.

Proceed with this action? [y/N]: y
